hotels.name: Flag Hotel Campo Maior
hotels.description_fr:
"The Flag Hotel Campo Maior stands as a landmark of hospitality in the region, housed in a former hotel building that has been renovated to expand the range of accommodations in the Alentejo region. Combining simplicity and minimalism with modernity, this 3-star hotel reflects the essence of Campo Maiorâ€”a land of coffee and borderland traditions. Staying at this hotel will be an ideal retreat for those wishing to explore the Alentejo plains or the townâ€™s fortifications, ensuring a stay where the past and the present come together in perfect harmony."

hotels.description_en:
This property is located in the country side on a 5-minute drive out of Ã‰vora, one of Portugalâ€™s most historic cities and the famed Roman Temple.

The guesthouse consists a two-bedroom family suite, a double room, a single room, all with private bathroom with shower, and a communal lounge area with free tea-coffee services and a library. On the property are also two apartments features a living area, kitchen, one or two bedroom(s) and a bathroom with shower.
All rooms and apartments are provided with free bottled water.

The 7-hectare property features a swimming pool, animals such as dogs, donkey and pigs as well as a vegetable garden, an ornamental garden, cork and olive trees.

Breakfast and dinner service is available upon request at an extra fee.
